# CWE-601 negative: redirect limited to same-site paths (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-601-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"strings"
)

func OAuthReturn(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	target := r.URL.Query().Get("next")
	if !strings.HasPrefix(target, "/") || strings.Contains(target, "//") {
		http.Error(w, "bad redirect", http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	http.Redirect(w, r, target, http.StatusFound)
}
